authorized_scope: liquidity_capacity metadata-only conflict resolution planning only; no lake write

resolution_rule.precondition: all business columns identical within duplicate key group
resolution_rule.rationale: The selected run is the full year backfill run; the superseded run is a smoke-window run. Business values are identical for all 1,830 duplicate key groups, so source precedence changes lineage selection but not business values.

non_authorized_scope: in-place overwrite of current quarantine candidate
